<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Ceremony Arch](15-ceremony-arch.jpg)

The single most-photographed object of your wedding day. We do a site visit, agree the structure (rented or yours), and then it's a five-hour build the morning of the ceremony with two florists.

## What's in it

- Heavy on focal blooms — peonies, garden roses, ranunculus
- Trailing greenery (smilax, jasmine, ivy)
- Built on a rental or supplied frame

## Care

We strike it the morning after. Asymmetric corners can be reused for the head table — tell us in advance and we'll build to allow it.
